# NeoCloud

Last Updated: 2026-06-01

---

## Definition

NeoCloud

= AI Native Cloud

专门为AI训练和推理服务的云厂商

区别于传统Hyperscaler

Examples:

CoreWeave

Nebius

Lambda

Crusoe

Applied Digital

---

## Investment Thesis

AI需求增长

↓

GPU需求增长

↓

传统云厂商供给不足

↓

AI原生云获得市场份额

↓

NeoCloud收入增长

---
